The '''Trophy for Excellence in Hunting in Etyyy''' was an award given only to people that [[Sordaan Xris]] considered the best hunters of their generation. To gain this trophy, Xris tasked individuals with killing six legendary creatures in the hunting grounds of [[Rodian Hunting Grounds|Etyyy]]: [[Greyclimber]] the [[Kashyyyk greyclimber]], [[Spiketop]] the [[Uller]], [[Stoneleg]] the [[Walluga]], [[Paleclaw]] the [[Mouf]], [[Brightclaw]] the Mouf, and [[Silkthrower]] the [[Wyyyschokk/Legends|Wyyyschokk]]. Once an individual had killed each of these creatures and brought him back a memento of the kill, he would call a meeting to award the individual.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''
